title: Mako: A Self-Evolving Agentic Operating System (SE-AOS) for Autonomous Web Exploitation
abstract: We introduce the Self-Evolving Agentic Operating System (SE-AOS): a new class of AI agent that treats exploit capability as a mutable, versioned kernel it extends at runtime, observing its own failures, synthesising new capabilities, proving them against a live target, and hot-loading them back into itself. Mako is the first SE-AOS instance for security research and the autonomous web exploitation engine developed within LaunchSafe. LaunchSafe builds autonomous security agents for continuous offensive testing and agent-driven security research; Mako is the core engine behind that platform. On the public XBOW validation-benchmarks, 104 containerised, CTF-style web applications spanning 26 vulnerability classes across three difficulty tiers, Mako achieves full-suite coverage: it drives every one of the 104 targets to emit a cryptographically fresh, per-build flag, under a verification regime that makes fabricated or memorised results impossible. Our central result is a law of autonomous exploitation: once a capability exists and is discoverable, difficulty collapses; capability, not reasoning, is what is scarce, together with an architecture and formalism that turn that law into a self-improving system. Mako further runs a gated self-evolution loop that proposes, sandboxes, and commits improvements to its own agents and rules when fitness does not regress. We deliberately withhold the operational results, payloads, exploit chains, and tool source, because a system that reduces full-spectrum web exploitation to a repeatable, machine-speed pipeline is dual-use research of concern. We publish the science; we withhold the weapon.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种自进化智能体操作系统Mako，用于自主网络利用，在安全研究基准上实现了全覆盖，但完全不涉及推荐系统。
abstract_cn: 我们提出自演化智能体操作系统（Self-Evolving Agentic Operating System, SE-AOS）：一类新型AI智能体，它将利用能力视为一个可变的、版本化的内核，在运行时对其进行扩展，通过观察自身失败、合成新能力、在实时目标上验证这些能力，并将其热加载回自身。Mako是首个SE-AOS实例，专为安全研究及LaunchSafe平台内开发的自主网络利用引擎而设计。LaunchSafe构建自主安全智能体，用于持续性进攻测试与智能体驱动的安全研究；Mako是该平台背后的核心引擎。在公开的XBOW验证基准测试中——包含104个容器化的CTF风格Web应用，涵盖26种漏洞类别，横跨三个难度等级——Mako实现了全套件覆盖：它在验证机制下驱动全部104个目标生成每个构建版本独有的加密新鲜标志，使得伪造或记忆结果成为不可能。我们的核心发现是一条自主利用定律：一旦某种能力存在且可被发现，难度便随之消失；稀缺的是能力而非推理，同时我们提出了一种架构与形式化方法，将这一定律转化为一个自我改进的系统。Mako进一步运行一个门控自演化循环，当适应度未退化时，该循环会提议、沙箱测试并提交对其自身智能体与规则的改进。我们有意不公开操作结果、载荷、利用链及工具源代码，因为一个将全频谱Web利用简化为可重复、机器速度流水线的系统属于具有双重用途的研究。我们公开科学原理，但保留武器细节。

title: A Unified Framework for Comprehensive Cardiac CT Segmentation and Phenotyping: Human-in-the-Loop Data Annotation, Vision Foundation Model Development, Multicenter Evaluation and Clinical Validation
abstract: Comprehensive quantification of cardiac structures from computed tomography (CT) remains limited not by data availability but by the scalability of measurements, which makes routine use impractical. Here we present a unified framework for comprehensive cardiac CT segmentation and phenotyping that combines a human-in-the-loop annotation pipeline, a cardiac CT augmentation technique, and a self-supervised foundation model pre-trained on 60,000 unlabeled cardiac CT scans. Using this approach, we assembled the largest and most comprehensive expert-annotated cardiac CT segmentation dataset to date, comprising 1598 cases and 14 distinct cardiac structures (1000 for training, 598 for the external test set). Across five external datasets, the framework segmented all structures more accurately and comprehensively than existing open-source tools. Self-supervised pre-training improved labeling efficiency, with the most significant gains observed during external evaluation in the low-data regime. Benchmarking across convolutional, transformer, and state-space architectures showed comparable performance, indicating that data quality and pre-training, rather than architecture, drove accuracy. The framework was scaled to population-level phenotyping, with segmented anatomy that carries functionally relevant information about ventricular function and disease severity beyond demographic variables. By openly releasing the largest dataset with human labels, code, model weights, a CT augmentation library, and software, this work provides a reproducible foundation for opportunistic cardiac phenotyping from routinely acquired CT scans.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一框架，结合人机协同标注、数据增强和自监督基础模型，用于心脏CT的全面分割和表型分析，并在多中心评估中验证了其准确性和可扩展性。
abstract_cn: 基于计算机断层扫描（CT）的心脏结构全面量化，其限制因素并非数据可获取性，而是测量方法的可扩展性，这使得常规应用难以实现。本文提出一个用于全面心脏CT分割与表型分析的统一框架，该框架结合了人机协同标注流程、心脏CT增强技术，以及一个基于60,000例未标注心脏CT扫描预训练的自监督基础模型。采用该方法，我们构建了迄今为止规模最大、最全面的专家标注心脏CT分割数据集，包含1598例病例和14个不同的心脏结构（其中1000例用于训练，598例用于外部测试集）。在五个外部数据集上，该框架对所有结构的分割准确性和全面性均优于现有开源工具。自监督预训练提高了标注效率，在低数据量场景下的外部评估中效果最为显著。对卷积架构、Transformer架构及状态空间架构的基准测试显示性能相当，表明数据质量与预训练而非架构本身决定了准确性。该框架已扩展至人群水平表型分析，其分割的解剖结构携带与心室功能和疾病严重程度相关的功能信息，其价值超越人口统计学变量。通过公开释放最大规模的人工标注数据集、代码、模型权重、CT增强库及软件，本研究为基于常规CT扫描的机会性心脏表型分析提供了可复现的基础。

title: Automated Textbook Auditing with Multi-Agent LLM Systems
abstract: Ensuring the quality of educational materials requires more than standard proofreading: textbooks must be audited for factual accuracy, domain-specific technical correctness, and linguistic quality simultaneously -- a task that general-purpose grammar checkers cannot address. We present \textbf{AI Textbook Auditor}, a modular multi-agent pipeline for automated quality assurance of educational materials across subject domains. The system accepts a textbook PDF and produces a structured, human-reviewable report via two analysis tracks: a \textbf{Factual and Technical Track} in which an ensemble of specialized LLM agents detects factual inaccuracies, code errors, incorrect definitions, and conceptual inconsistencies, augmented with web search for humanities domains; and a \textbf{Grammar Track} operating PDF-natively to preserve diacritical encoding. A \textbf{Judge Agent} filters false positives using domain-specific rules before presenting findings to a human reviewer. The pipeline supports two ingestion modes -- vision-native page rendering and PyMuPDF text extraction -- and is domain-adaptable via custom prompts encoding subject-specific error taxonomies. We demonstrate the system on two Romanian upper-secondary textbooks: a CS textbook (56 technical findings across seven categories, with an expert-validated precision of 62.5\%) and a history and social sciences textbook (72 findings spanning factual errors, ideological bias, and grammar). The system is designed as a triage tool that reduces the manual effort of locating candidate issues, with human expert validation required before any editorial action.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于多智能体LLM的自动化教科书审核系统，用于检测事实错误、技术错误和语法问题，并在罗马尼亚教科书上验证了有效性。
abstract_cn: 确保教材质量需要超越标准校对流程：教科书必须同时接受事实准确性、领域专业技术正确性及语言质量的审查——这一任务通用语法检查器无法胜任。我们提出**AI教科书审计系统（AI Textbook Auditor）**，这是一个模块化的多智能体流水线，用于跨学科领域的教材自动化质量保障。该系统接收教科书PDF文件，通过两条分析轨道生成结构化且可供人工审阅的报告：**事实与技术轨道（Factual and Technical Track）**，由一组专业大语言模型（LLM）智能体协同检测事实错误、代码错误、定义错误及概念不一致性，并针对人文学科领域辅以网络搜索增强；**语法轨道（Grammar Track）**，以PDF原生方式运行以保留变音符号编码。**裁决智能体（Judge Agent）**在将发现结果提交人工审阅前，利用领域特定规则过滤误报。该流水线支持两种输入模式——视觉原生页面渲染与PyMuPDF文本提取——并可通过编码学科特定错误分类法的自定义提示实现领域适配。我们在两本罗马尼亚高中教科书上演示了该系统：一本计算机科学教科书（跨七个类别共56项技术发现，经专家验证的精确率为62.5%）以及一本历史与社会科学教科书（涵盖事实错误、意识形态偏见及语法问题共72项发现）。该系统被设计为一种分诊工具，可减少定位候选问题的人工工作量，所有编辑操作前均需经人类专家验证。

reasons: 偏好主题：systems

title: Towards Predictive, Aligned, and Scalable Robot Learning
abstract: Learning, at its core, extends beyond memorization to the ability to reason and solve novel problems by navigating a space of possibilities. We introduce Lumo-2, a latent world-action model that generates actions by reasoning over world dynamics in latent space. The learned latent world dynamics capture physically grounded visual transitions, naturally encoding future possibilities and providing a unified substrate for cross-modal alignment. This formulation enables predictive reasoning akin to world modelling while remaining lightweight and focused on physical dynamics relevant to control. Central to our approach is the hypothesis that action generation quality is governed by the geometry of the latent space. We observe that standard reconstruction-based action tokenization objectives induce representations biased toward low-level signal fidelity, leading to misalignment between reconstruction quality and downstream control performance. To address this limitation, we propose a multi-stage modality pre-alignment strategy in which action representations are progressively aligned with latent world dynamics, vision, and language. This process enforces cross-modal consistency, promotes abstraction, and induces a structured latent space for predictive reasoning. We provide a systematic empirical study of latent world modelling and modality alignment, analyzing their roles in scaling laws and out-of-distribution generalization. Results show that Lumo-2 consistently outperforms strong vision-language-action (VLA) and world-action model (WAM) baselines, with gains on challenging real-world tasks requiring temporal reasoning, physical understanding, or high control complexity, including long-horizon and dexterous manipulation. These findings suggest that structured multimodal alignment and predictive reasoning are fundamental principles for advancing embodied intelligence.
tldr: 该论文提出Lumo-2，一种潜在世界-动作模型，通过多阶段模态预对齐和潜在空间推理提升机器人控制性能，在长时程和灵巧操作任务上优于现有基线。
abstract_cn: 学习的核心，不仅在于记忆，更在于通过探索可能性空间进行推理并解决新问题的能力。我们提出Lumo-2，一种潜在世界-动作模型（latent world-action model），该模型通过在潜在空间中对世界动态进行推理来生成动作。学习到的潜在世界动态能够捕捉基于物理的视觉转换，自然地编码未来可能性，并为跨模态对齐提供统一基础。这种公式化方法使得预测性推理（类似于世界建模）成为可能，同时保持轻量化，并专注于与控制相关的物理动态。我们方法的核心假设是：动作生成质量由潜在空间的几何结构决定。我们观察到，标准的基于重建的动作分词目标会导致表征偏向于低层级信号保真度，从而造成重建质量与下游控制性能之间的错位。为解决这一局限，我们提出一种多阶段模态预对齐策略，其中动作表征逐步与潜在世界动态、视觉和语言进行对齐。该过程强制实现跨模态一致性，促进抽象化，并诱导出用于预测性推理的结构化潜在空间。我们对潜在世界建模与模态对齐进行了系统的实证研究，分析了它们在规模定律和分布外泛化中的作用。结果表明，Lumo-2持续优于强大的视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）与世界-动作模型（WAM）基线，在需要时间推理、物理理解或高控制复杂度的挑战性真实世界任务（包括长时程与灵巧操作）上取得了更优性能。这些发现表明，结构化多模态对齐与预测性推理是推动具身智能发展的基本原则。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：capture、language

title: Valid $\ne$ Necessary: Diagnosing Latent Inefficiency in Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it often incurs substantial computational costs due to over-reasoning: the generation of redundant, verbose, or irrelevant steps. While existing reasoning step evaluators effectively detect logical fallacies and factual errors, our analysis reveals a critical blind spot: they fail to penalize valid but inefficient reasoning steps that inflate token usage without contributing to the solution. To systematically diagnose this limitation, we introduce RIV-GSM8K, a diagnostic benchmark injected with five distinct types of inefficiencies, including circular reasoning and excessive decomposition. Diagnostic experiments reveal that state-of-the-art evaluators struggle to distinguish these inefficiencies from necessary reasoning. To address this gap, we propose CAID (Context-Aware Information Density), a training-free metric grounded in information theory that identifies low-utility steps. To validate the metric's practical utility, we apply it within PACE, a post-hoc compression strategy. Additional control experiments show that the gains of PACE are not explained by trivial pruning: compared with random step removal and PRM-based compression baselines, it preserves accuracy at substantially higher compression rates. Empirical results on GSM8K, StrategyQA, and ARC-Challenge demonstrate that PACE reduces token consumption by 31-53% while maintaining accuracy, confirming that CAID successfully distills informational froth from reasoning chains without compromising deductive validity.
tldr: 论文提出CAID指标和PACE压缩策略，用于诊断和减少链式思维推理中的低效步骤，在保持准确性的同时显著降低token消耗。
abstract_cn: 思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）提示显著提升了大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）的推理能力，然而，由于过度推理（over-reasoning）——即生成冗余、冗长或不相关的步骤——往往导致巨大的计算成本。尽管现有的推理步骤评估器能够有效检测逻辑谬误和事实错误，但我们的分析揭示了一个关键盲区：它们未能惩罚那些虽有效但低效的推理步骤，这些步骤增加了令牌消耗却对解决方案无实质贡献。为系统性地诊断这一局限，我们引入了RIV-GSM8K，这是一个注入了五种不同类型低效性（包括循环推理和过度分解）的诊断基准。诊断实验表明，最先进的评估器难以将这些低效性与必要推理区分开来。为解决这一问题，我们提出了CAID（Context-Aware Information Density，上下文感知信息密度），这是一种基于信息论的无训练度量指标，用于识别低效用步骤。为验证该度量的实际效用，我们将其应用于PACE（一种事后压缩策略）中。额外的控制实验表明，PACE的性能提升并非源于简单的剪枝：与随机步骤移除和基于PRM的压缩基线相比，它在显著更高的压缩率下保持了准确性。在GSM8K、StrategyQA和ARC-Challenge上的实证结果表明，PACE在保持准确性的同时将令牌消耗降低了31-53%，证实了CAID能够在不损害演绎有效性的前提下，成功地从推理链中提取信息泡沫。

title: Multi-Agent LLMs Fail to Explore Each Other
abstract: Exploration is essential for reliable autonomy in multi-agent systems, yet it remains unclear whether large language model (LLM) agents can explore effectively when interacting with one another. We show that modern LLM agents fail to do so, often exhibiting myopic and polarized interaction patterns that lead to suboptimal coordination and increased regret. We formalize this challenge as the Multi-Agent Exploration problem, modeling it as a partially observable stochastic game (POSG) problem in which agents must probe peers to infer their capabilities and identify effective interaction strategies. To address this, we introduce Multi- Agent Contextual Exploration (MACE), a lightweight framework that explicitly promotes exploration through structured peer selection. Across both contextual and parametric diversity settings, MACE substantially improves exploration behavior and downstream task performance. We further show theoretically that the value of exploration increases with agent diversity. Overall, our results highlight a fundamental limitation of current LLM agents and underscore the importance of explicitly guided exploration for reliable multi-agent autonomy. Code will be released in https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/mace
tldr: 论文发现现代LLM智能体在多智能体交互中无法有效探索，并提出MACE框架通过结构化同伴选择来改善探索行为，提升任务性能。
abstract_cn: 探索对于多智能体系统中的可靠自主性至关重要，但目前尚不清楚大语言模型（LLM）智能体在相互交互时能否有效进行探索。我们发现，现代LLM智能体未能做到这一点，它们常常表现出短视和两极化的交互模式，导致协作欠佳并增加遗憾值。我们将这一挑战形式化为多智能体探索问题，并将其建模为部分可观测随机博弈（POSG）问题，在此问题中，智能体必须探测同伴以推断其能力并识别有效的交互策略。为解决这一问题，我们提出了多智能体上下文探索（MACE）框架，这是一种轻量级方法，通过结构化的同伴选择明确促进探索。在上下文多样性和参数多样性两种设置下，MACE显著改善了探索行为及下游任务性能。我们进一步从理论上证明，探索的价值随智能体多样性的增加而提升。总体而言，我们的研究结果揭示了当前LLM智能体的一个根本性局限，并强调了明确引导的探索对于实现可靠多智能体自主性的重要性。代码将在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/mace 发布。

title: An Empirical Study for GUI Test Migration from Android to OpenHarmony System
abstract: To reduce the substantial engineering effort required to test the corresponding applications from Android to OpenHarmony, migrating existing GUI test cases has become a critical problem. However, current research neither proposes solutions tailored for OpenHarmony nor provides a systematic evaluation of migration approaches on this system, leaving developers with limited empirical guidance in practice. In this paper, we present the first systematic empirical study of test migration from Android to OpenHarmony. Specifically, we first construct a dataset referred to as the ATH Benchmark, comprising 36 commercial applications with an average of over 9 billion downloads, along with 108 manually designed test cases. Second, we select two state-of-the-art test migration approaches (i.e., ReSPlay and ITeM) and adapt these two approaches to enable their execution on OpenHarmony. Third, we use the preceding infrastructure to evaluate these two approaches from three perspectives, including testing performance, root causes of failures, and the impact of OpenHarmony characteristics. Our results reveal that existing test migration approaches are less effective (15% success-rate on ReSPlay and 26% success-rate on ITeM) in Android-to-OpenHarmony scenarios. Through an in-depth analysis of failed cases, we identify that test performance is primarily hindered by OpenHarmony-specific characteristics, including technical architecture differences and unique ecosystem traits. Utilizing these findings, we propose an enhanced approach based on ITeM, referred as ITeM-HM, which incorporates specific OpenHarmony system features. As a result, ITeM-HM successfully achieves a 214% success-rate relative improvement over the original ITeM (from 26% to 81%).
tldr: 该论文通过构建基准数据集和适配现有方法，实证研究了从Android到OpenHarmony的GUI测试迁移，发现现有方法成功率低，并提出了改进方法ITeM-HM，将成功率从26%提升至81%。
abstract_cn: 为减少将对应应用程序从Android迁移至OpenHarmony所需的大量工程测试工作，迁移现有GUI测试用例已成为关键问题。然而，现有研究既未提出针对OpenHarmony的定制化解决方案，也未对该系统上的迁移方法进行系统性评估，导致开发者在实践中缺乏有效的经验指导。本文首次对从Android到OpenHarmony的测试迁移进行了系统性实证研究。具体而言，我们首先构建了一个名为ATH Benchmark的数据集，包含36款商业应用（平均下载量超过90亿次）及108个手工设计的测试用例。其次，我们选取了两种最先进的测试迁移方法（即ReSPlay和ITeM），并对这两种方法进行适配以使其能在OpenHarmony上执行。第三，我们利用上述基础设施从三个维度评估这两种方法，包括测试性能、失败根因以及OpenHarmony特性的影响。研究结果表明，现有测试迁移方法在Android到OpenHarmony场景中效果不佳（ReSPlay成功率为15%，ITeM成功率为26%）。通过对失败案例的深入分析，我们发现测试性能主要受OpenHarmony特有特性的阻碍，包括技术架构差异及独特的生态系统特征。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种基于ITeM的增强方法，称为ITeM-HM，该方法融入了特定的OpenHarmony系统特性。最终，ITeM-HM相较于原始ITeM实现了214%的成功率相对提升（从26%提升至81%）。

reasons: 偏好主题：however

title: DeepBias: Adaptive In-depth Probing of Social Biases in LVLMs
abstract: While Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities, they remain highly susceptible to embedded social biases. Existing bias evaluation protocols predominantly rely on static datasets, which provide only a superficial assessment, as their fixed test cases cannot adaptively evolve to measure the true depth and limits of model vulnerabilities. We introduce DeepBias, an adaptive framework for the in-depth probing of social biases in LVLMs with carefully designed agents. Our approach operates through a dynamic ''generation-evolution-probing'' loop. First, a generative ProposerAgent synthesizes test data and is iteratively updated via Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) based on the target LVLM's responses, exploring model-specific failure modes. Second, an autonomous skill-driven DiggerAgent rewrites each test data across multiple probing turns, adaptively selecting from a curated skill library of deepening and rewriting strategies. At each turn, this process is conditioned on the model's previous response, enabling progressively deeper biases to be exposed. Furthermore, we build a benchmark named DeepBiasBench using our framework. By employing an ensemble of five diverse state-of-the-art LVLMs as anchors, the benchmark captures vulnerabilities shared across architectures. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework and show that DeepBias provides a challenging benchmark for in-depth bias evaluation, establishing an evolutionary paradigm for LVLM safety assessment.
tldr: 该论文提出DeepBias框架，通过动态生成-演化-探测循环自适应地深入探测大型视觉语言模型中的社会偏见。
abstract_cn: 尽管大型视觉语言模型（Large Vision-Language Models, LVLMs）展现出卓越的能力，但它们仍然极易受到内嵌社会偏见的影响。现有的偏见评估协议主要依赖静态数据集，仅能提供浅层评估，因其固定的测试用例无法自适应地演化，以衡量模型脆弱性的真实深度与极限。我们提出DeepBias，一个通过精心设计的智能体对LVLMs中社会偏见进行深度探测的自适应框架。该方法通过一个动态的“生成-演化-探测”循环运作。首先，生成式提议智能体（ProposerAgent）合成测试数据，并基于目标LVLM的响应通过直接偏好优化（Direct Preference Optimization, DPO）进行迭代更新，以探索模型特定的失效模式。其次，一个自主的、技能驱动的挖掘智能体（DiggerAgent）在多个探测轮次中重写每条测试数据，并从精心策划的深化与重写策略技能库中自适应地选择策略。在每一轮中，该过程均以模型先前的响应为条件，从而逐步暴露更深层次的偏见。此外，我们利用该框架构建了一个名为DeepBiasBench的基准测试。通过集成五个不同的先进LVLMs作为锚点，该基准测试捕捉了跨架构共有的脆弱性。全面的实验证明了我们框架的有效性，并表明DeepBias为深度偏见评估提供了一个具有挑战性的基准，为LVLM安全评估建立了一种演化范式。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：preference

title: Heterogeneous Agent Cohorts for Safe Open-Ended Exploration with Runtime Constraint Memory
abstract: LLM agents today are caught in an awkward bind. Lock them down with static safety instructions and they rarely venture beyond the obvious; give them free reign with tools and multi-agent debate, and safety violations quickly follow. Rather than forcing a single model to juggle both creativity and caution, we separate the concerns across specialized roles. A Disrupter generates unconventional proposals, a Validator enforces hard runtime checks at the tool gateway, and a Broker pulls in distant but relevant analogies. Failures are not discarded -- they are compiled, via MCTS, into compact, signed constraint patches we call Scars. These patches are cached locally and inherited by future cohorts, turning repeated failures into reusable, low-cost runtime constraints. In a spatial-semantic sandbox (N=20 runs, p<0.01), our cohort reaches remote targets where debate fails, the Validator prevents all executed breaches, and Scars reduce token consumption by 15.1% by avoiding redundant validator checks. Furthermore, credit-based Communication Allocation Scores (CAS) restrict outbound bandwidth, reducing overall token costs by 55.9% under resource constraints.
tldr: 该论文提出一种异构智能体群体框架，通过分离创造力与安全性角色，并利用MCTS生成可复用的约束补丁，在保证安全的同时实现高效开放探索。
abstract_cn: 当前的大语言模型（LLM）智能体陷入了一种尴尬的困境：若以静态安全指令加以约束，它们便极少敢于探索明显边界之外的内容；若赋予其工具使用与多智能体辩论的自由，安全违规行为便会迅速出现。我们并未迫使单一模型同时兼顾创造力与谨慎性，而是将不同关注点分离至专门角色之中。一个“颠覆者”（Disrupter）生成非常规提案，一个“验证者”（Validator）在工具网关处执行严格的运行时检查，一个“经纪人”（Broker）则引入虽遥远但相关的类比。失败并非被丢弃——而是通过蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）被编译为紧凑且带签名的约束补丁，我们称之为“疤痕”（Scars）。这些补丁被本地缓存，并由后续智能体群体继承，从而将重复出现的失败转化为可复用、低成本的运行时约束。在一个空间-语义沙盒环境中（N=20次运行，p<0.01），我们的智能体群体能够抵达辩论方法无法触及的远程目标，验证者阻止了所有已执行的违规行为，而疤痕通过避免冗余的验证器检查，将令牌消耗降低了15.1%。此外，基于信用的通信分配分数（CAS）限制了出站带宽，在资源受限条件下将总体令牌成本降低了55.9%。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：liu

title: HandFlow: Fully Generative 4D Hand Recovery with Flow Matching
abstract:
Accurate monocular 4D hand reconstruction remains challenging. Per-frame discriminative regressors lack temporal context and often produce jittery predictions. Temporal models improve consistency by aggregating information across frames, but they are typically deterministic regressors, making them vulnerable to ambiguous observations caused by occlusion and motion blur. Generative modeling offers a natural alternative by learning a prior over plausible hand motion sequences, enabling coherent hand-state recovery when visual evidence is incomplete or unreliable.
  Motivated by this observation, we present HandFlow, a fully generative flow-matching framework for temporally coherent 3D hand pose and shape estimation from monocular video. Given visual and skeletal observations, HandFlow denoises an entire temporal window of MANO parameters through a single ODE integration. To support this, we use a Flux-style dual-stream transformer that attends across the full sequence to capture long-range dependencies without autoregressive decoding, and a confidence-aware continuous masking mechanism that blends observed features with learnable mask tokens to handle noisy or missing observations. Experiments on DexYCB and HOT3D show that HandFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly large gains in world-space accuracy and temporal smoothness. It reduces world-space pose error by over 30% compared with the strongest baseline and achieves the lowest acceleration error among all evaluated methods, while remaining competitive in per-frame pose accuracy. Moreover, on a single GPU HandFlow reconstructs a 150-frame sequence at 47 fps, about 12x faster than the fastest prior video-based method, with reconstruction itself accounting for only a small fraction of the end-to-end latency.
tldr: HandFlow提出了一种基于流匹配的全生成式框架，用于从单目视频中恢复时间一致的4D手部姿态和形状，在DexYCB和HOT3D数据集上实现了最先进的性能，显著提高了世界空间精度和时间平滑性。
abstract_cn:
精确的单目4D手部重建仍具挑战性。逐帧判别式回归器缺乏时间上下文，常产生抖动预测。时序模型通过聚合跨帧信息提升一致性，但通常为确定性回归器，易受遮挡与运动模糊导致的模糊观测影响。生成式建模通过学习合理手部运动序列的先验知识，提供了一种自然替代方案，能在视觉证据不完整或不可靠时实现连贯的手部状态恢复。

基于此观察，我们提出HandFlow——一种全生成式流匹配框架，用于从单目视频中实现时间连贯的3D手部姿态与形状估计。给定视觉与骨骼观测，HandFlow通过单次ODE积分对MANO参数的整个时间窗口进行去噪。为此，我们采用Flux风格的双流Transformer，通过全序列注意力捕获长程依赖而无需自回归解码，并设计置信度感知的连续掩码机制，将观测特征与可学习掩码令牌融合以处理含噪或缺失观测。在DexYCB与HOT3D上的实验表明，HandFlow实现了最先进的性能，尤其在全局空间精度与时间平滑性方面取得显著提升。与最强基线相比，其全局空间姿态误差降低超过30%，在所有评估方法中达到最低加速度误差，同时保持逐帧姿态精度的竞争力。此外，在单GPU上，HandFlow以47fps的速度重建150帧序列，比最快的现有视频方法快约12倍，且重建本身仅占端到端延迟的一小部分。

reasons: 偏好主题：capture、transformer、video

title: ProgramTab: Boosting Table Reasoning of LLMs via Programmatic Paradigm
abstract: Table-based reasoning with large language models (LLMs), which requires reasoning based on natural language questions and structured tabular data, has gained widespread attention. However, a series of issues still constrain the application of this task. The previous approaches suffered from significant performance degradation when faced with large tables due to the difficulty of long text modeling and the limitation of input length for LLMs. The text-to-SQL approach is used to efficiently extract key information from tables and generate smaller sub-tables. However, tabular data, especially web tables, often lack the necessary structure and consistency, making them unsuitable for performing mathematical logic operations using SQL queries. We propose the ProgramTab framework, which guides LLMs employing in-context learning to perform tabular data preprocessing with Python code, as well as the momentous contents extraction with row and column extraction and SQL generation. The experiment results on table reasoning datasets demonstrate that the ProgramTab framework effectively deals with table-based reasoning tasks and outperforms all LLM-based baselines.
tldr: 该论文提出ProgramTab框架，通过编程范式（Python代码）增强LLM在表格推理任务上的表现，有效处理大型表格并优于基线方法。
abstract_cn: 基于大语言模型的表格推理（Table-based reasoning with large language models, LLMs）要求根据自然语言问题和结构化表格数据进行推理，已受到广泛关注。然而，一系列问题仍制约着该任务的应用。先前的方法在面对大型表格时，由于长文本建模的困难以及大语言模型输入长度的限制，性能显著下降。文本到SQL（text-to-SQL）方法被用于高效提取表格中的关键信息并生成较小的子表。然而，表格数据，尤其是网页表格，往往缺乏必要的结构和一致性，不适合使用SQL查询执行数学逻辑运算。我们提出了ProgramTab框架，该框架引导大语言模型利用上下文学习（in-context learning）通过Python代码进行表格数据预处理，并通过行与列提取及SQL生成来提取重要内容。在表格推理数据集上的实验结果表明，ProgramTab框架能有效处理基于表格的推理任务，且性能优于所有基于大语言模型的基线方法。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：language、liu、however

title: What We Talk About When We Talk About LLM Planning: Evidence for Two Distinct Planning Abilities
abstract: When LLMs exhibit uneven performance across planning tasks, these gaps are often attributed to task difficulty. We argue that this explanation is incomplete, as task-level variation may reflect distinct latent planning competencies rather than differences along a single ability spectrum. We study this question on ACPBench-Hard by evaluating multiple LLM families under varying test-time reasoning budgets and applying a multidimensional item response theory model to uncover the latent competency structure underlying LLM planning. The analysis reveals two principal dimensions that shape planning performance: operational reasoning, the ability to evaluate local action applicability and immediate state transitions, and structural enumeration, the ability to reason about goal reachability and landmark structure. Operational reasoning improving under model scaling and longer reasoning traces, while structural enumeration remains comparatively insensitive. Our findings motivate competency-level evaluation of LLM planning, shifting the focus from whether models improve overall to which planning competencies improve, under what conditions, and why.
tldr: 论文通过多维项目反应理论模型分析LLM在规划任务中的表现，发现存在两种独立的规划能力：操作推理和结构枚举，且模型扩展和推理链长度仅提升操作推理能力。
abstract_cn: 当大语言模型（LLMs）在各类规划任务中表现出不均衡的性能时，这些差距通常被归因于任务难度。我们认为这一解释并不完整，因为任务层面的差异可能反映了不同的潜在规划能力，而非沿单一能力谱系的差异。我们在ACPBench-Hard上研究了这一问题，通过评估多个LLM家族在不同测试时推理预算下的表现，并应用多维项目反应理论模型来揭示LLM规划背后的潜在能力结构。分析揭示了塑造规划性能的两个主要维度：操作推理（operational reasoning），即评估局部动作适用性与即时状态转换的能力；以及结构枚举（structural enumeration），即推理目标可达性与地标结构的能力。操作推理随模型规模扩展和更长推理轨迹而提升，而结构枚举则相对不敏感。我们的研究结果促使对LLM规划进行能力层面的评估，将关注点从模型是否整体提升，转向在何种条件下、为何种规划能力得到提升，以及其原因。

title: RepTran: Search-Based Repair of Transformer Models
abstract: To ensure the overall quality of AI-enabled software, not only traditional software components but also AI components need to be tested and repaired. Among AI components, Transformer models are increasingly integrated into software systems, which makes their misbehaviors critical. Although prior work in the software engineering community has proposed deep neural network (DNN) repair methods, most overlook Transformer-specific structures. We propose RepTran, a search-based repair method for Transformer models. It targets their feed-forward networks (FFNs), which play a central role in the architecture. RepTran identifies suspicious weights by combining two types of scores: a variance-based neuron score and an existing bidirectional score. It then iteratively optimizes these weights using differential evolution. Our evaluation includes 18 fault benchmarks constructed from CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet. We compare RepTran against three baselines: random weight selection, Arachne (a state-of-the-art DNN repair method), and ArachneW, which enables Arachne to control the number of selected weights. RepTran achieved an average repair rate of 74.7%, statistically outperforming random selection and Arachne across all benchmarks. Effect size analysis revealed that RepTran achieved higher repair rates than ArachneW regardless of the number of selected weights. These results suggest that RepTran is effective for enhancing the reliability of AI-enabled software.
tldr: 该论文提出RepTran，一种基于搜索的Transformer模型修复方法，通过优化前馈网络中的可疑权重，在故障基准上实现了74.7%的平均修复率。
abstract_cn: 为确保人工智能赋能软件的整体质量，不仅需要测试和修复传统软件组件，还需对AI组件进行测试与修复。在AI组件中，Transformer模型正日益集成到软件系统中，这使得其异常行为变得至关重要。尽管软件工程领域的先前研究已提出深度神经网络（DNN）修复方法，但大多数方法忽略了Transformer特有的结构。我们提出RepTran，一种基于搜索的Transformer模型修复方法。该方法针对Transformer架构中起核心作用的前馈网络（FFN）。RepTran通过结合两种分数来识别可疑权重：基于方差的神经元分数和现有的双向分数。随后，它利用差分进化算法迭代优化这些权重。我们的评估包括基于CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet构建的18个故障基准。我们将RepTran与三种基线方法进行比较：随机权重选择、Arachne（一种最先进的DNN修复方法）以及ArachneW（该方法使Arachne能够控制所选权重的数量）。RepTran实现了74.7%的平均修复率，在所有基准上统计上优于随机选择和Arachne。效应量分析表明，无论所选权重数量如何，RepTran均取得了比ArachneW更高的修复率。这些结果表明，RepTran能有效增强人工智能赋能软件的可靠性。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：transformer、systems

title: SCALECUA: Scaling Computer Use Agents with Verifiable Task Synthesis and Efficient Online RL
abstract: Computer use agents (CUAs) are emerging as a powerful interface for automating complex digital workflows through visual perception and GUI execution. Online reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a key direction for scaling their capabilities. However, this paradigm is bottlenecked by verifiable data scarcity and online RL inefficiency. To break these barriers, we introduce ScaleCUA, a unified framework that scales online RL for CUAs via verifiable task synthesis and efficient training. At the data level, we design VeriGen, an end-to-end framework for generating verifiable RL tasks through iterative docker interactions and a multi-agent feedback loop. Scaled to 100+ concurrent agent workers via a shared docker interaction probe, this pipeline produces 24K+ verifiable tasks and nearly 3K high-quality RL tasks. To maximize sample efficiency, we propose Frontier Sampling, which tracks per-task capability and allocates rollouts to the current learning frontier. On the training side, we further design Visual Context Segmentation, a sliding window over recent visual context that balances rollout and training-engine pressure, yielding a 2.83x training speedup over step-wise decomposition. Together, ScaleCUA achieves 68.7% on OSWorld and 54.0% on ScienceBoard, establishing new state-of-the-art performance among open-source computer use agents. Code, models, and datasets are available at https://github.com/THUDM/SCALE-CUA.
tldr: 该论文提出ScaleCUA框架，通过可验证任务合成和高效在线强化学习，显著提升了计算机使用智能体在OSWorld和ScienceBoard上的性能。
abstract_cn: 计算机使用代理（CUAs）正成为一种强大的接口，通过视觉感知和图形用户界面执行来自动化复杂的数字工作流程。基于可验证奖励的在线强化学习（RLVR）已成为扩展其能力的关键方向。然而，这一范式受到可验证数据稀缺和在线强化学习效率低下的瓶颈制约。为突破这些障碍，我们引入了ScaleCUA，这是一个统一的框架，通过可验证任务合成与高效训练来扩展CUAs的在线强化学习。在数据层面，我们设计了VeriGen，这是一个端到端的框架，通过迭代的Docker交互和多智能体反馈循环生成可验证的强化学习任务。通过共享的Docker交互探针扩展到100多个并发代理工作进程，该流程生成了超过24K个可验证任务和近3K个高质量强化学习任务。为最大化样本效率，我们提出了前沿采样（Frontier Sampling），它追踪每个任务的能力并将探索分配至当前学习前沿。在训练方面，我们进一步设计了视觉上下文分割（Visual Context Segmentation），即对近期视觉上下文采用滑动窗口，以平衡探索与训练引擎的压力，相比逐步分解实现了2.83倍的训练加速。综合来看，ScaleCUA在OSWorld上达到68.7%，在ScienceBoard上达到54.0%，在开源计算机使用代理中树立了新的最优性能。代码、模型和数据集可在https://github.com/THUDM/SCALE-CUA获取。

偏好主题：liu、however

title: The Path to Self-Evolving Clinical Systems: Scaling Medical Agents from Assistance to Autonomy
abstract: The growing ability of large language models and vision language models to jointly interpret and reason over images and text is reshaping medical agents, moving them from task specific predictors toward autonomous systems that perceive, reason, plan, remember, and act in clinical environments. This work departs from the capability first perspective of existing literature and instead begins from clinical deployment, asking what tasks, contamination resistant benchmarks, and interactive training environments are required before medical agents can be trusted in practice. Medical agents are formalized as sequential decision making systems under partial observability, together with a three level autonomy taxonomy spanning assisted, cooperative, and fully autonomous operation. The field is organized along a unified scaling spine consisting of framework scaling, capability scaling, and environment scaling. Within this framework, clinical environment scaling, the integration of tools, data, and clinical gyms, is identified as the most actionable yet underexplored direction for agents operating in PACS, EHR, and FHIR ecosystems. Clinical self evolution, where agents improve through interaction with their environments rather than parameter scaling alone, is further positioned as a key research frontier, drawing insights from self improving agents, agent gyms, and test time compute scaling. Applications across radiology, pathology, ophthalmology, and hospital workflows are examined together with deployment challenges including hallucination, cascading failures, and fairness. By consolidating more than 300 references, with particular emphasis on advances from 2025 to 2026, this work provides a roadmap toward trustworthy, self improving medical imaging systems for real clinical practice.
tldr: 该论文探讨了如何通过框架、能力和环境扩展，将医疗智能体从辅助型发展为完全自主的临床系统，并强调了基于环境交互的自我进化作为关键研究方向。
abstract_cn: 大型语言模型与视觉语言模型在联合解释和推理图像与文本方面的能力日益增强，正在重塑医学智能体，使其从特定任务的预测系统转变为能够在临床环境中感知、推理、规划、记忆和行动的自主系统。本研究不同于现有文献中“能力优先”的视角，而是从临床部署出发，探讨在医学智能体能够被信任应用于实践之前，需要具备哪些任务、抗污染基准以及交互式训练环境。医学智能体被形式化为在部分可观测条件下的序列决策系统，并提出了一个涵盖辅助操作、协作操作和全自主操作的三级自主性分类体系。该领域沿着统一的扩展主轴进行组织，包括框架扩展、能力扩展和环境扩展。在这一框架下，临床环境扩展——即工具、数据和临床健身房（clinical gyms）的整合——被确定为在PACS、EHR和FHIR生态系统中运行的智能体最具可操作性但尚未充分探索的方向。临床自我进化——即智能体通过与环境的交互而非仅依赖参数扩展来提升自身能力——被进一步定位为关键研究前沿，借鉴了自我改进智能体、智能体健身房（agent gyms）以及测试时计算扩展（test-time compute scaling）的相关见解。本文还考察了放射学、病理学、眼科学及医院工作流程中的应用，以及包括幻觉、级联故障和公平性在内的部署挑战。通过整合300余篇参考文献，并特别关注2025至2026年间的进展，本研究为构建可信赖、可自我改进的医学影像系统以应用于真实临床实践提供了路线图。

reasons: 偏好主题：language、systems

title: AMT-X: Phase-Structured Multi-Turn Red-Teaming with Checklist-Gated Evaluation
abstract: Safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) relies largely on single-turn attack datasets and single-judge scoring, underestimating risk from adaptive multi-turn adversaries and reporting a single success rate that does not separate partially actionable outputs from those carrying complete operational detail. We propose AMT-X (Adaptive Multi-Turn Exploitation), a phase-structured multi-turn red-teaming framework. Unlike prior multi-turn attacks that rely on ad hoc escalation or free-form per-goal plans, AMT-X casts the attack as an explicit, reproducible multi-phase state machine driven by semantic signals from the victim, and replaces single-judge scoring with a multi-role jury whose phase-conditioned checklists gate success on actionable harm. Across six frontier victim models (queried under their default safety alignment, without added moderation layers) and seven Moderation sub-categories, AMT-X attains overall attack success rates of 97.6-100% under a lenient score threshold, but 66.7-78.6% under a stricter gate requiring complete, real, and operational detail: a gap of up to 33 percentage points between partially and fully actionable harm.
tldr: 该论文提出AMT-X，一种基于阶段结构的多轮红队测试框架，通过多角色陪审团和阶段条件检查表评估LLM安全漏洞，发现不同严格程度下攻击成功率的显著差距。
abstract_cn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的安全性评估在很大程度上依赖于单轮攻击数据集和单一评判者评分，这低估了自适应多轮对手带来的风险，并且报告单一成功率时未能将部分可操作的输出与包含完整操作细节的输出区分开来。我们提出AMT-X（自适应多轮利用），一种分阶段结构化的多轮红队测试框架。与以往依赖临时升级或自由形式每目标计划的多轮攻击不同，AMT-X将攻击建模为一个由受害者语义信号驱动的显式、可复现的多阶段状态机，并用一个多角色评审团取代单一评判者评分，该评审团通过阶段条件检查清单来判定是否成功实现可操作的危害。在六个前沿受害者模型（在其默认安全对齐设置下查询，未添加额外审核层）和七个审核子类别中，AMT-X在宽松评分阈值下实现了97.6-100%的整体攻击成功率，但在要求完整、真实且可操作细节的严格检查清单下，成功率为66.7-78.6%：部分可操作危害与完全可操作危害之间的差距高达33个百分点。

reasons: 偏好主题：language

title: The Hidden Footprint: Making Storage a First-Class Metric for LLM Agent Evaluation
abstract: LLM agent benchmarks measure task completion, reliability, and inference cost, but not the persistent data an agent run leaves on disk, including logs, context snapshots, checkpoints, and debug traces. We introduce AgentFootprint, a cross-framework benchmark of post-run agent storage footprint. Its serialization-aware metric suite measures total retention, channel composition, duplication, growth, compressibility, and conversation-history reconstructability. It addresses a measurement trap: naive byte-level measurement understates duplication by an order of magnitude because database paging and JSON escaping obscure repeated content. A fixed-trace control separates agent-generated logical volume from persistence-layer amplification: replaying the same trajectory through seven persisting frameworks yields a 6.7x spread. Under identical models, tools, and tasks, configurations with 100% accuracy differ by 15.7x in retained bytes, although their defaults support different recovery and audit capabilities. Three full-history configurations grow superlinearly on a repeated-observation stress task. Exported trajectories from 108 instance-normalized SWE-bench Verified submissions span three orders of magnitude per instance, with no detectable correlation with resolve rate. A content-addressed store reduces retention by 4.8x-32.7x while preserving every reconstructability score. These results establish persistent storage as a resource metric to report jointly with accuracy and reconstructability.
tldr: 该论文提出AgentFootprint基准，用于评估LLM agent运行后留下的持久存储足迹，发现不同框架和配置下存储开销差异巨大，且与任务准确率无相关性。
abstract_cn: LLM智能体基准测试衡量任务完成度、可靠性和推理成本，但并未评估智能体运行后在磁盘上留下的持久化数据，包括日志、上下文快照、检查点和调试追踪。我们提出AgentFootprint，一种跨框架的智能体运行后存储占用基准测试。其序列化感知的度量套件可衡量总保留量、通道组成、重复率、增长量、可压缩性以及对话历史可重构性。它解决了一个测量陷阱：由于数据库分页和JSON转义掩盖了重复内容，单纯的字节级测量会将重复率低估一个数量级。通过固定追踪控制将智能体生成的逻辑卷与持久化层放大效应分离：在七个持久化框架上重放同一轨迹会产生6.7倍的差异。在相同模型、工具和任务条件下，准确率达100%的配置在保留字节数上相差15.7倍，尽管其默认设置支持不同的恢复和审计能力。三种全历史配置在重复观测压力测试中呈现超线性增长。来自108个实例归一化SWE-bench验证提交的导出轨迹，每个实例跨越三个数量级，且与解决率无显著相关性。一种内容寻址存储将保留量减少4.8倍至32.7倍，同时保持每个可重构性评分。这些结果确立了持久化存储作为一项资源指标，需与准确率和可重构性共同报告。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》

title: NextFund: A Unified Performance Tracking Platform for Agentic Portfolio Management
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) based agents are beginning to participate in portfolio construction and market analysis, where decisions must be justified under evolving information and risk constraints. Current assessment practice, however, remains poorly aligned with this setting: many studies rely on static examinations or report only terminal portfolio returns, while the intermediate evidence, analyst judgments, and execution steps that produced those returns stay largely invisible. We introduce NextFund, an evaluation platform that makes financial-agent behavior observable under live market conditions. The platform couples time-consistent market access, coordinated multi-agent analysis, and persistent logging of the full decision path from observation to trade. Through an interactive Trading Arena, users can compare models across markets, inspect equity curves, and drill from leaderboard outcomes down to individual justifications. We present NextFund on Hong Kong, U.S., and China A-share equities, illustrating how inspectable decision histories enable fairer benchmarking and more actionable diagnosis. Our demo is available at https://paradoox.cn/nextfund/.
tldr: 该论文提出了NextFund平台，用于在实时市场条件下评估金融智能体的决策过程，通过可检查的决策历史实现更公平的基准测试和可操作的诊断。
abstract_cn: 基于大语言模型（LLMs）的智能体正开始参与投资组合构建与市场分析，在此类场景中，决策必须在信息动态变化与风险约束条件下得到合理解释。然而，当前的评估实践与该场景仍存在显著脱节：许多研究依赖于静态测试或仅报告最终投资组合收益，而生成这些收益的中间证据、分析师判断及执行步骤大多不可见。我们提出NextFund——一个在实时市场条件下使金融智能体行为可观测的评估平台。该平台整合了时间一致的市场接入、协同多智能体分析，以及从观察到交易全决策路径的持久化日志记录。通过交互式交易竞技场（Trading Arena），用户可跨市场比较模型、查看权益曲线，并从排行榜结果逐层下钻至个体决策依据。我们基于香港、美国及中国A股市场展示了NextFund，揭示了可审查的决策历史如何实现更公平的基准测试与更具可操作性的诊断。我们的演示地址为：https://paradoox.cn/nextfund/。

reasons: 偏好主题：language、users、however

title: BeatEdit: Symbolic Music Generation as Explicit Editing
abstract: Music creation is fundamentally a process of revision. Yet symbolic music generation remains dominated by paradigms that produce complete sequences from scratch, with limited support for selective modification. Edit-based methods have proven effective for text transformation tasks, but remain largely unexplored for symbolic music. We trace this absence to the representational level: conventional event-based music encodings lack the structural properties required by explicit music editing. In contrast, the BEAT encoding, a beat-grid-anchored representation originally designed for autoregressive generation, possesses structural properties amenable to editing. We propose BeatEdit, the first framework for symbolic music generation based on explicit edit operations, recasting generation as producing new content by editing a draft rather than synthesizing from scratch. BeatEdit comprises three complementary mechanisms along an axis of increasing edit density: per-token sequence tagging for error correction, iterative refinement for accompaniment editing, and tag-then-fill for segment completion. All these mechanisms share a single encoding and pre-trained backbone, achieving higher precision and perceptual quality than autoregressive and diffusion methods across all three tasks, while remaining efficient, with single-pass inference completing in under 100 ms. Cross-encoding evaluation further reveals that encoding design substantially influences editing effectiveness, with notable encoding-method interaction effects. Code is available at https://github.com/Haoyu-Gu/BeatEdit-code
tldr: 该论文提出BeatEdit，首个基于显式编辑操作的符号音乐生成框架，通过将生成视为对草稿的编辑而非从头合成，在精度和感知质量上优于自回归和扩散方法。
abstract_cn: 音乐创作本质上是一个修改的过程。然而，符号音乐生成仍主要被从零开始生成完整序列的范式所主导，对选择性修改的支持十分有限。基于编辑的方法在文本转换任务中已被证明有效，但在符号音乐领域仍鲜有探索。我们将这一缺失归因于表征层面：传统的基于事件的音乐编码缺乏显式音乐编辑所需的结构特性。相比之下，BEAT编码（一种最初为自回归生成设计的节拍网格锚定表征）具备适于编辑的结构特性。我们提出BeatEdit，这是首个基于显式编辑操作的符号音乐生成框架，将生成过程重新定义为通过编辑草稿而非从零合成来产生新内容。BeatEdit沿编辑密度递增的轴线包含三种互补机制：用于纠错的逐标记序列标注、用于伴奏编辑的迭代优化，以及用于乐段补全的先标注后填充。所有这些机制共享同一编码和预训练骨干网络，在全部三项任务中均实现了比自回归和扩散方法更高的精度与感知质量，同时保持高效，单次推理可在100毫秒内完成。跨编码评估进一步揭示，编码设计显著影响编辑效果，且存在明显的编码-方法交互效应。代码可在https://github.com/Haoyu-Gu/BeatEdit-code获取。

reasons: 偏好主题：liu

title: VIA: Visual Interface Agent for Robot Control
abstract: Robot manipulation is a complex task that requires visual understanding, physical reasoning, planning, and closed-loop control. General-purpose foundation models (FMs) have grown remarkably capable of some of these, especially vision and reasoning. To leverage this for generalist robot policies, current methods typically involve converting existing FMs into vision-language-action (VLA) models by fine-tuning on robot data to output low-level actions. However, VLAs are often orders of magnitude smaller than frontier FMs given the limited data and compute available for fine-tuning, which in turn limits their general capability. Inspired by the growing ability of FMs to operate software through visual interfaces, we ask whether that same competence suffices to control a robot. We present VIA (Visual Interface Agent for robot control), a framework that recasts robot control as an agentic task: an off-the-shelf FM-powered agent drives a manipulator through a browser-based 3D interface by taking screenshots, issuing intuitive commands, observing the outcome, and adjusting. The agent receives no robot-specific fine-tuning and no access to privileged state information: it perceives visual input and acts through a small set of general tools. VIA inherits the agent's general reasoning, closed-loop error recovery, and ability to plan and re-plan from what it observes. It solves a diverse suite of tabletop manipulation tasks zero-shot with both Claude Code and Codex. With the strongest model (Fable 5) it achieves 96.7% success on three LIBERO-Goal tasks and 100% on a long-horizon rainbow assembly task. Performance improves with the scale and strength of the underlying model. These results suggest that frontier agents already possess skills that transfer directly to robot control given the right interface: your coding or computer-use agent is, in a sense, secretly a robot-control agent.
tldr: 该论文提出VIA框架，利用现成的基础模型通过浏览器3D界面控制机器人，无需微调，在桌面操作任务上取得高成功率。
abstract_cn: 机器人操作是一项需要视觉理解、物理推理、规划与闭环控制的复杂任务。通用基础模型（FMs）在其中的某些方面，尤其是视觉与推理能力上，已展现出显著进步。为利用这些能力构建通用型机器人策略，当前方法通常通过在机器人数据上进行微调，将现有基础模型转化为视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，以输出底层动作。然而，由于可用于微调的数据与计算资源有限，VLA模型的规模往往比前沿基础模型小数个数量级，这反过来限制了其通用能力。受基础模型通过视觉界面操作软件的能力日益增强的启发，我们探究这种能力是否足以控制机器人。本文提出VIA（面向机器人控制的视觉界面代理，Visual Interface Agent for robot control）框架，该框架将机器人控制重新定义为一种代理任务：一个由现成基础模型驱动的代理，通过基于浏览器的3D界面操控机械臂，具体方式包括截取屏幕截图、发出直观指令、观察结果并进行调整。该代理未接受任何针对机器人的微调，也无法获取特权状态信息：它仅通过视觉输入感知环境，并借助少量通用工具执行操作。VIA继承了基础代理的通用推理能力、闭环错误恢复能力，以及基于观察进行规划与重新规划的能力。在Claude Code与Codex的支持下，它能够零样本解决一系列桌面操作任务。使用最强模型（Fable 5）时，它在三项LIBERO-Goal任务上达到96.7%的成功率，并在一个长时域彩虹组装任务上实现100%的成功率。性能随底层模型的规模与能力增强而提升。这些结果表明，前沿代理已具备可直接迁移至机器人控制的技能——只要提供恰当的界面：你的编程或计算机使用代理，在某种意义上，其实是一个隐藏的机器人控制代理。

reasons: 偏好主题：however

title: MusicMark: A Robust Generative Watermarking Framework for Music Generation
abstract: AI music generation has rapidly advanced alongside commercial platforms, raising the need for reliable watermarking for provenance and attribution. However, existing audio watermarking research has largely focused on speech, and applying speech-oriented methods to music is challenging due to music's complex structure and rich acoustic texture. Most existing methods are post-hoc, adding imperceptible perturbations after generation rather than embedding watermarks as part of the content. This makes them fragile under transformations and especially vulnerable to neural codec re-synthesis, which can discard imperceptible residual signals. Moreover, since generation and watermarking are decoupled, the watermarking step can be bypassed or omitted, weakening provenance guarantees. To address these issues, we propose MusicMark, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the first generative watermarking framework for music. Specifically, MusicMark embeds watermark messages into the semantic latent space during generation, incorporating the watermark as part of the musical content and ensuring robustness against diverse attacks, particularly neural codec re-synthesis. To this end, we introduce a watermark adapter into a diffusion-based generation model to embed watermark messages across denoising steps. The adapter and detector are trained with a joint objective that preserves fidelity by constraining watermarked latents close to their unwatermarked reference latents, while improving robustness through attack augmentations. Experiments demonstrate that MusicMark substantially outperforms post-hoc baselines across diverse attacks including neural codec re-synthesis, while maintaining comparable generation quality. We further introduce a cover-song attack, converting the singing voice while preserving musical content, and show that MusicMark remains more robust than post-hoc methods.
tldr: 该论文提出MusicMark，一种针对音乐生成的鲁棒性生成式水印框架，通过将水印嵌入到扩散模型的语义潜在空间中，在保持生成质量的同时抵御包括神经编解码重合成在内的多种攻击。
abstract_cn: 随着商业平台的快速发展，AI音乐生成技术取得了显著进步，这引发了对可靠水印技术的需求，以实现来源追溯与归属认证。然而，现有音频水印研究主要聚焦于语音领域，由于音乐具有复杂的结构与丰富的声学纹理，将面向语音的方法应用于音乐面临诸多挑战。现有方法大多属于事后处理，即在生成后添加不易察觉的扰动，而非将水印作为内容的一部分嵌入其中。这使得它们在面对变换时较为脆弱，尤其容易受到神经编解码器重合成的影响——该过程会丢弃不易察觉的残余信号。此外，由于生成与水印环节相互解耦，水印步骤可能被绕过或省略，从而削弱了来源追溯的保障。为解决上述问题，我们提出了MusicMark——据我们所知，这是首个面向音乐的生成式水印框架。具体而言，MusicMark在生成过程中将水印信息嵌入语义隐空间，使水印成为音乐内容的组成部分，从而确保对多种攻击（尤其是神经编解码器重合成）的鲁棒性。为此，我们在基于扩散的生成模型中引入了一个水印适配器，以在去噪步骤中嵌入水印信息。该适配器与检测器通过联合目标进行训练：通过约束含水印的隐变量接近其无印参考隐变量来保持保真度，同时通过攻击增强提升鲁棒性。实验表明，MusicMark在包括神经编解码器重合成在内的多种攻击下显著优于事后处理方法，同时保持了可比的生成质量。我们进一步引入了一种翻唱歌曲攻击，即在保留音乐内容的同时转换歌声，结果显示MusicMark比事后方法具有更强的鲁棒性。

reasons: 偏好主题：however

title: AgentCheck: A Reproduce-Intervene-Mitigate Workbench for LLM Agents over MCP
abstract: Tool-using LLM agents are mostly evaluated assuming all tools work. When a tool times out, returns a week-stale value, or has its description poisoned in deployment, the developer needs a controlled way to reproduce the failure, test a fix, and confirm the fix worked before deployment. We present AgentCheck, an open-source web workbench that turns an MCP server into an intervention surface. AgentCheck runs an agent against its real tools and records every tool response, then re-runs the agent with the response perturbed by a fault (12 types) injector. Matching tool calls are replayed from cache, and later tool calls go live after the agent diverges. This yields a reproduce-intervene-confirm loop: the developer toggles a mitigation, re-runs against the identical fault, and sees if the failure goes away. Scoring has two parts: deterministic pass/fail rules, plus an LLM judge for interpretive labels, validated against human annotations. Across five agents, the best passes 105/120 scenarios and the weakest only 77. The failures are usually silent, confident use of incorrect tool outputs rather than crashes. On the weakest agent, a retry mitigation raises success on timeout error faults from as few as 30% of cases to 100%, whereas stale-data faults remain near 3-4 of 10 regardless of the mitigation. AgentCheck makes these failure modes reproducible, comparable, and verifiable before deployment.
tldr: 论文提出AgentCheck，一个基于MCP的工作台，通过故障注入和回放机制，帮助开发者复现、干预和验证LLM智能体在工具使用中的故障，实验表明重试缓解可将超时错误成功率从30%提升至100%，但对陈旧数据效果有限。
abstract_cn: 使用工具的LLM智能体（Tool-using LLM agents）大多在假设所有工具均正常工作的条件下进行评估。当某个工具超时、返回一周前的陈旧值，或在部署过程中其描述被篡改时，开发者需要一种可控的方式来复现故障、测试修复方案，并在部署前确认修复有效。我们提出AgentCheck，这是一个开源网络工作台，可将MCP服务器转化为干预界面。AgentCheck让智能体在其真实工具上运行，并记录每一次工具响应，随后通过故障（共12种类型）注入器扰动响应后重新运行智能体。匹配的工具调用从缓存中重放，而后续工具调用则在智能体行为偏离后转为实时执行。由此形成一个“复现-干预-确认”循环：开发者切换一种缓解措施，在相同故障条件下重新运行，并观察故障是否消失。评分包含两部分：确定性通过/失败规则，以及用于解释性标签的LLM评判器（LLM judge），该评判器已通过人工标注验证。在五个智能体上，最佳表现者通过了105/120个场景，最弱者仅通过77个。故障通常表现为无声且自信地使用错误的工具输出，而非系统崩溃。在最弱的智能体上，重试缓解措施将超时错误故障的成功率从低至30%提升至100%，而陈旧数据故障无论采取何种缓解措施，成功率仍维持在每10次中约3-4次。AgentCheck使得这些故障模式在部署前可复现、可比较且可验证。

title: OS-Pruner: Pruning Chains-of-Thought of Reasoning Models via Optimal Stopping
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting. However, these models often exhibit "computational overthinking," generating redundant reasoning steps that increase latency and cost without improving accuracy. Recent studies suggest that CoT trajectories can be significantly pruned, yet existing methods often rely on forcing a static thinking budget, heuristic filtering, sub-optimal early exit via classification, or expensive re-training. In this paper, we introduce OS-Pruner, a lightweight plug-in framework that formulates chain-of-thought pruning as an optimal stopping problem. Given a reasoning prefix, OS-Pruner learns whether further reasoning is worth its token cost by optimizing an explicit utility that trades off final-answer accuracy against generated length. Our novel formulation enables the model to dynamically assess the sufficient point of termination for a reasoning chain. OS-Pruner is designed to be lightweight during both training and inference, and to provide users with fine-grained control over the reasoning-effort vs. accuracy trade-off. On diverse reasoning benchmarks and base models, OS-Pruner achieves 20-60\% reduction in generation length with minimal accuracy sacrifice.
tldr: 本文提出OS-Pruner，将链式推理剪枝建模为最优停止问题，在保持精度的同时减少20-60%的生成长度。
abstract_cn: 大语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）通过思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）提示在复杂推理任务中取得了显著成功。然而，这些模型常常表现出“计算性过度思考”，生成冗余的推理步骤，从而增加延迟和成本，却并未提升准确性。近期研究表明，思维链轨迹可以被大幅剪枝，但现有方法往往依赖于强制设定静态思考预算、启发式过滤、通过分类进行次优早期退出，或代价高昂的重新训练。本文提出OS-Pruner，一种轻量级插件框架，将思维链剪枝形式化为最优停止问题。给定一个推理前缀，OS-Pruner通过优化一个权衡最终答案准确性与生成长度的显式效用函数，来学习进一步推理是否值得其令牌成本。我们的新颖公式使模型能够动态评估推理链的充分终止点。OS-Pruner在训练和推理过程中均设计为轻量级，并为用户提供对推理努力与准确性之间权衡的细粒度控制。在多种推理基准测试和基础模型上，OS-Pruner在几乎不牺牲准确性的情况下，实现了生成长度20-60%的缩减。

title: NVAITC AI Scientist: A Governed End-to-End Research System -- A Hypertension GWAS Case Study
abstract: Agentic research systems are emerging as a new paradigm for coordinating scientific workflows beyond isolated model inference, code generation, or statistical analysis. However, deployment in institutional biomedical environments requires governed mechanisms for research planning, data access, workflow orchestration, evidence tracking, reproducibility, and human oversight. We present NVAITC AI Scientist (NAIS), a governed end-to-end agentic research system designed to support domain-general scientific workflows while keeping protected data within institutional privacy boundaries. NAIS integrates proposal review, execution planning, governed computational routing, reproducible workflow orchestration, evidence generation, and scientist-in-the-loop oversight. We validate NAIS in a real-world hypertension genome-wide association study (GWAS) using hospital-linked genotype and electronic health record (EHR) data from 286,422 individuals under an aggregate-only data policy. The agent planned cohort extraction, orchestrated GWAS execution, generated quality-control summaries, and drafted publication-oriented outputs. Human-AI review identified phenotype discrepancies and enabled iterative refinement of the hypertension definition. After reconciliation, the agent-orchestrated GWAS reproduced established hypertension loci, including FGF5, ATP2B1, CNNM2, FTO, and GRB14, with the strongest signal at FGF5 reaching $-\log_{10}(p) \sim 70$. As a secondary demonstration, NAIS also supported a drug-induced liver injury prediction workflow, achieving a multimodal graph neural network AUC of 0.842. These results demonstrate that governed agentic research systems can support scalable AI-assisted biomedical discovery while producing outputs comparable to expert-led workflows.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个受治理的端到端智能体研究系统NAIS，用于高血压全基因组关联研究，并成功复现了已知的遗传位点。
abstract_cn: 代理型研究系统正成为一种协调科学工作流的新范式，其能力超越了孤立的模型推理、代码生成或统计分析。然而，在机构生物医学环境中部署此类系统，需要针对研究规划、数据访问、工作流编排、证据追踪、可重复性及人类监督建立受治理的机制。我们提出NVAITC AI科学家（NAIS），这是一个受治理的端到端代理型研究系统，旨在支持通用科学工作流，同时将受保护数据保留在机构隐私边界内。NAIS集成了提案评审、执行规划、受治理的计算路由、可重复的工作流编排、证据生成以及科学家参与式监督。我们在一项真实世界的高血压全基因组关联研究（GWAS）中验证了NAIS，该研究使用了来自286,422名个体的医院关联基因型与电子健康记录（EHR）数据，并遵循仅聚合数据政策。该代理规划了队列提取，协调了GWAS执行，生成了质量控制摘要，并起草了面向发表的输出。人机联合评审识别出表型差异，并实现了对高血压定义的迭代优化。经协调后，由代理协调的GWAS重现了已知的高血压位点，包括FGF5、ATP2B1、CNNM2、FTO和GRB14，其中FGF5的信号最强，达到$-\log_{10}(p) \sim 70$。作为二次验证，NAIS还支持了一项药物性肝损伤预测工作流，实现了多模态图神经网络AUC达0.842。这些结果表明，受治理的代理型研究系统能够支持可扩展的AI辅助生物医学发现，同时产生与专家主导工作流相当的结果。

title: Controlling Motion Transfer in Diffusion Transformers via Attention Heads
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have advanced video generation with high-quality, temporally coherent results. However, extending them to motion transfer, which requires following reference motion while aligning with a target prompt, remains challenging due to limited understanding of motion and structure representations within DiTs. We analyze video DiTs at the attention-head level and identify distinct heads specialized for motion and spatial structure. Based on this insight, we propose a head-aware controllable motion transfer framework that requires no parameter updates. Our method refines motion cues from motion-specialized heads via semantic correspondence guidance and preserves structure through selective feature injection. This head-level control not only enables accurate motion transfer but also provides an interpretable foundation for controllable video generation with DiTs.
tldr: 该论文通过分析扩散变换器中注意力头对运动和结构的表征，提出了一种无需参数更新的头感知可控运动迁移框架，实现了精确的运动迁移和可解释的视频生成。
abstract_cn: 扩散变换器（Diffusion Transformers, DiTs）在视频生成领域取得了进展，能够生成高质量且时间连贯的结果。然而，将其扩展到运动迁移任务——即需在遵循参考运动的同时与目标提示对齐——仍面临挑战，原因在于对DiTs内部运动与结构表征的理解有限。我们在注意力头（attention-head）层级对视频DiTs进行分析，识别出分别专精于运动与空间结构的特定注意力头。基于这一发现，我们提出了一种无需参数更新的、具有注意力头感知能力的可控运动迁移框架。该方法通过语义对应引导，从运动专精注意力头中提炼运动线索，并通过选择性特征注入保留结构信息。这种注意力头层级的控制不仅实现了精确的运动迁移，还为基于DiTs的可控视频生成提供了可解释的基础。

title: Are LLMs Ready for Scientific Discovery? A Capability-Oriented Benchmark for AI Scientists
abstract: Existing benchmarks for scientific data analysis evaluate LLMs primarily on code execution or workflow completion, overlooking that scientific analysis serves to support distinct types of scientific claims: hypothesis exploration, statistical inference, mechanistic explanation, each with different assumptions and validity criteria. We introduce SDABench, a benchmark that reorganizes evaluation around six capabilities (descriptive, exploratory, inferential, predictive, causal, and mechanistic) across five domains (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Geography, Physics). SDABench comprises 527 real-data instances (SDA-Real) and 6000 synthetic instances (SDA-Synth), each in both multiple-choice and open-ended formats, constructed through an automated pipeline. Evaluating 15 representative LLMs, we find that models handle descriptive analysis well but degrade sharply on tasks requiring assumption selection, latent-process modeling, or mechanistic reasoning. SDABench further provides a five-stage error analysis framework that locates where LLMs fail: more advanced models more reliably identify the relevant scope and variables, but still struggle to select appropriate analytical procedures, model variable relationships, and draw valid conclusions.
tldr: 论文提出了SDABench基准，评估LLM在科学数据分析中的六种能力，发现模型在描述性分析上表现良好，但在假设选择、潜在过程建模和机制推理上表现不佳。
abstract_cn: 现有科学数据分析基准主要基于代码执行或工作流完成情况评估大语言模型（LLMs），却忽视了科学分析旨在支撑不同类型的科学主张：假设探索、统计推断、机制解释——每种类型均具有不同的假设前提与有效性标准。我们提出SDABench基准，该基准围绕六种能力（描述性、探索性、推断性、预测性、因果性、机制性）在五个领域（生物学、化学、环境科学、地理学、物理学）重新组织评估体系。SDABench包含527个真实数据实例（SDA-Real）与6000个合成实例（SDA-Synth），每个实例均以选择题和开放式问题两种形式呈现，并通过自动化流程构建。通过对15个代表性LLMs的评估，我们发现模型能较好处理描述性分析，但在需要假设选择、潜在过程建模或机制推理的任务中表现急剧下降。SDABench进一步提供了五阶段错误分析框架，可定位LLMs的失败环节：更先进的模型能更可靠地识别相关范围与变量，但在选择恰当分析程序、建模变量关系及得出有效结论方面仍存在困难。

title: Do Video-LLMs Actually Watch? Diagnosing Character-Tracking Failures in Long-Form Video
abstract: Can a Video Large Language Model (Video-LLM) follow one person through a long video, keeping track of who they are well enough to report, in order, how their outfit changes across a full TV episode? Benchmarks increasingly score this kind of task, and the strongest open-source 7--8B models now reach 37--38% on InfiniBench's global appearance task, which asks exactly that. But does that score come from tracking the named character, or from something easier? We test this with a nine-condition diagnostic protocol applied to three architecturally distinct open-source Video-LLMs, with Gemini~2.5~Flash as a frontier reference, and find the accuracy does not come from character tracking. When we change the character named in the question to a different cast member, leaving the video and answer options untouched, the models change their answer only 4--31% of the time, so they are largely ignoring who the question asks about. Breaking that test down by the gender of the swapped name shows why: the models react more when the name is changed to a different-gender character than to a same-gender one (a 13--28 point gap), picking up coarse gender cues but unable to tell same-gender individuals apart. This shallow processing surfaces again when we drop the multiple-choice options and ask the same questions open-endedly: open-source accuracy drops 18--25 points, with none of 151 answers fully correct, versus a 12-point drop for Gemini. Further checks rule out the obvious innocent explanations, adding subtitles, using the most informative frames, or doubling the number of frames all leave character tracking unimproved, so the bottleneck is not how much video the model sees but how it ties that video to the person the question names. We release a diagnostic toolkit for auditing what such benchmark scores actually measure.
tldr: 论文通过诊断实验发现，Video-LLM在长视频角色追踪任务中的高准确率并非源于真正的角色跟踪，而是依赖性别等粗浅线索，模型无法区分同性别角色。
abstract_cn: 视频大语言模型（Video-LLM）能否在长视频中追踪特定人物，准确识别其身份，并按顺序报告其服装在一整集电视剧中的变化？基准测试越来越多地对此类任务进行评分，目前最强的开源7-8B模型在InfiniBench的全局外观任务（Global Appearance Task）上已达到37-38%的准确率，而该任务正是要求模型完成上述目标。但这一分数究竟源于对命名角色的追踪，还是源于某种更简单的机制？我们通过一项包含九种条件的诊断协议，对三种架构不同的开源Video-LLM进行了测试，并以Gemini 2.5 Flash作为前沿参考，结果发现其准确率并非来自角色追踪。当我们将问题中命名的角色替换为另一位演员，而视频和答案选项保持不变时，模型仅在4-31%的情况下改变了答案，这表明它们在很大程度上忽略了问题所询问的对象。按替换名字的性别对测试结果进行细分，揭示了原因：当名字被替换为不同性别角色时，模型的反应比替换为同性别角色更为显著（差距达13-28个百分点），即模型能捕捉粗略的性别线索，但无法区分同性别个体。这种浅层处理在我们将选择题改为开放式问题后再次显现：开源模型的准确率下降了18-25个百分点，151个答案中无一完全正确，而Gemini的准确率仅下降12个百分点。进一步的检验排除了明显的合理解释——添加字幕、使用信息量最大的帧或加倍帧数均未能改善角色追踪性能，因此瓶颈不在于模型看到的视频量，而在于它如何将视频与问题中命名的人物关联起来。我们发布了一套诊断工具包，用于审计此类基准测试分数实际衡量的内容。

title: AdvancedMathBench: A Benchmark Suite for Advanced Mathematical Proof Generation and Verification
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on high-school and olympiad-style mathematics, yet their capabilities on advanced mathematics remain poorly understood. Existing benchmarks, however, fall short in both scope and evaluation granularity: they provide limited disciplinary coverage and often rely on final-answer correctness or coarse judgments, leaving the validity of the reasoning process inadequately assessed. To bridge this gap, we introduce AdvancedMathBench, a benchmark suite designed to evaluate advanced mathematical reasoning capabilities. Its core proof-generation benchmark, ProverBench, contains 296 problems spanning undergraduate and doctoral qualifying-exam levels. To provide reliable evaluation of the proofs, we develop a dedicated automatic verification pipeline trained on large-scale expert annotations to produce both correctness verdicts and fine-grained assessments of proof errors, which exhibits strong agreement with human experts on held-out proof trajectories. We further introduce VerifierBench, consisting of 888 model-generated proof trajectories paired with expert ground truth, to evaluate whether models can correctly judge proof validity and provide sound verification rationales. Experiments show that AdvancedMathBench remains challenging for frontier models. On proof generation, the best-performing model, GPT-5.5-xhigh, achieves only 75.8 and 66.1 on the UGD and QE splits, respectively, indicating substantial room for improvement on advanced mathematical proof construction. On proof verification, the best model attains a Balanced F1 of only 65.1, and models generally exhibit low true negative rates, suggesting that critical error detection remains a major bottleneck.
tldr: 该论文提出了AdvancedMathBench，一个用于评估大语言模型在高级数学证明生成与验证能力的基准套件，实验表明现有模型在该任务上表现有限。
abstract_cn: 大语言模型（LLMs）在高中及奥林匹克竞赛类数学问题上已展现出卓越性能，但其在高等数学领域的能力仍缺乏深入理解。现有基准测试在覆盖范围与评估粒度上均存在不足：学科覆盖面有限，且往往仅依赖最终答案正确性或粗粒度判断，未能充分评估推理过程的有效性。为弥补这一空白，我们提出AdvancedMathBench——一个专为评估高等数学推理能力而设计的基准测试套件。其核心的证明生成基准ProverBench包含296道涵盖本科至博士资格考试水平的问题。为对证明过程进行可靠评估，我们开发了一套专用自动验证流水线，该流水线基于大规模专家标注训练，可同时输出正确性判定与证明错误的细粒度评估，并在留出证明轨迹上与人类专家保持高度一致性。我们进一步引入VerifierBench，该基准包含888条模型生成的证明轨迹及对应的专家标注真值，用于评估模型能否正确判断证明有效性并提供合理的验证依据。实验表明，AdvancedMathBench对前沿模型仍具挑战性。在证明生成任务中，表现最佳的模型GPT-5.5-xhigh在UGD与QE子集上分别仅取得75.8分与66.1分，表明高等数学证明构建能力仍有显著提升空间。在证明验证任务中，最佳模型的平衡F1值仅为65.1，且模型普遍呈现低真负率，表明关键错误检测仍是主要瓶颈。

title: Forgetting Our Way to Shared Meaning: Effects of Forgetting on Conceptual Alignment in a Non-Partnership Coordination Game
abstract: Shared meaning in language requires people to learn and agree on categories. We ask how characteristics of agents' memories change the emergence and evolution of shared meaning. Without a coordination game, models of conceptual semantics cannot explain how shared meaning emerges and changes in groups of people; however, existing games assume that players share payoffs in a partnership setting. We model conceptual alignment as a non-partnership game and illustrate differences in actual and perceived conceptual convergence from counterfactual simulations using agents with varying levels of adaptiveness and memory degradation. We found that adaptive players achieved actual convergence faster and had closer final conceptual regions than non-adaptive players, while non-adaptive players perceived convergence earlier. Weighing novel information less over time resulted in more stable agreements than fixing the weight of novel information. Memory features are critical to the emergence and evolution of actual and perceived convergence.
tldr: 该论文研究在非合作协调博弈中，智能体的记忆特性（遗忘）如何影响共享概念的形成和演化，发现自适应和记忆衰减机制对实际和感知收敛有不同影响。
abstract_cn: 语言中的共享意义要求人们学习并达成范畴共识。本文探究智能体记忆特征如何改变共享意义的涌现与演化。缺乏协调博弈时，概念语义学模型无法解释共享意义如何在群体中涌现与变迁；然而现有博弈均假设参与者以伙伴关系共享收益。我们将概念对齐建模为非伙伴关系博弈，并通过反事实模拟，利用具有不同适应性与记忆衰减程度的智能体，揭示实际概念趋同与感知概念趋同的差异。研究发现：适应性智能体比非适应性智能体更快实现实际趋同，且最终概念区域更为接近，而非适应性智能体则更早感知到趋同。随时间推移降低新信息权重比固定新信息权重更易形成稳定协议。记忆特征对实际趋同与感知趋同的涌现及演化具有关键作用。

title: How Temperature Shapes Ideological Discourse in Retrieval-Augmented Generation?
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has been increasingly adopted to reduce hallucinations and strengthen the factual grounding of large language models (LLMs). While robustness to errors in the retrieval process has been explored, the impact of ideological bias on LLM outputs has been overlooked. For instance, if the retrieved material contains ideological positions, the RAG may transmit, amplify, or suppress such ideological discourses in its outputs. In this study, we address this issue by examining the influence of the RAG framework, comprising ideological discourses, in LLM-generated answers. To this end, we applied Lexical Multidimensional Analysis (LMDA) on a corpus of 1,117 COVID-19 treatment articles, identifying three ideological discourses. This corpus is then used as the external knowledge source for the RAG. We assessed several LLMs by having the models answer ideological questions at different sampling temperatures. The generated texts were assessed semantically and lexically based on their similarities with ideological reference texts. Our findings show that the RAG framework is prone to transferring ideological discourses into LLM responses, with sampling temperature having a measurable impact on the strength of this transfer. Discoursive alignment between generated answers and the reference text is highest at moderate temperatures, where models balance stochasticity with retrieval grounding, and drops at low temperatures, indicating that overly deterministic sampling suppresses discourse transfer.
tldr: 该论文研究RAG框架中意识形态话语的传递，发现采样温度影响话语转移强度，中等温度下话语对齐最高。
abstract_cn: 检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）已被越来越多地用于减少大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）的幻觉现象并增强其事实依据。尽管已有研究探讨了检索过程中错误的鲁棒性问题，但意识形态偏见对LLM输出的影响却被忽视了。例如，若检索到的材料包含意识形态立场，RAG可能会在其输出中传递、放大或抑制此类意识形态话语。本研究通过考察包含意识形态话语的RAG框架对LLM生成答案的影响来探讨这一问题。为此，我们对包含1117篇新冠肺炎治疗文章的语料库应用了词汇多维分析（Lexical Multidimensional Analysis, LMDA），识别出三种意识形态话语。该语料库随后被用作RAG的外部知识来源。我们通过让模型在不同采样温度下回答意识形态问题，对多个LLM进行了评估。基于生成文本与意识形态参考文本的语义和词汇相似性，我们对生成文本进行了评估。研究结果表明，RAG框架倾向于将意识形态话语转移到LLM的响应中，而采样温度对此转移强度具有可测量的影响。在中等温度下，生成答案与参考文本之间的话语对齐程度最高，此时模型在随机性与检索依据之间取得平衡；而在低温下对齐程度下降，表明过度确定性的采样抑制了话语转移。

reasons: 偏好主题：language

title: MET: Theory-Grounded and Culture-Aware Multilingual Moral Reasoning
abstract: Language models are increasingly used for moral decision-making across diverse linguistic and cultural contexts, yet existing work overlooks multilinguality on three aspects: 1) multilingual evaluation benchmarks use direct translation, failing to adapt culture-specific items; 2) inference-time methods for moral reasoning rely on static, English-centric scaffolds and lack grounding in moral theory; 3) training methods for moral decision-making typically require expensive supervision from stronger models or human annotators. We address these gaps with three contributions. First, we introduce MCLASH, a multilingual moral decision-making benchmark to capture culturally situated moral intuitions and social norms across languages. Second, we propose MET (Multilingual Ethics with Theory-grounded reasoning), a two-step prompting method built on expert-curated, theory-based grounds drawn from psychology and philosophy: the model first selects situation- and culture-specific grounds, then reasons over them in the native language of the user. Third, we introduce MET-D (MET-Distillation), which enhances the second step through a self-distillation training stage that requires no external supervision. MET-D improves macro-F1 over the base model on all three models of different sizes and families (Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma3-4B), by an average of 3.71 points on MCLASH and 4.23 on MMoralExceptQA, with a peak MCLASH gain of 12.94 points for Malay on Qwen3-8B. We further reveal that MET-D increases native-language reasoning by 62.13 points on average, and that beneficial grounds differ systematically across cultures. Together, these contributions open the path for culture-aligned, theory-grounded multilingual moral reasoning.
tldr: 论文提出MCLASH基准和MET方法，通过理论引导的多语言道德推理提升语言模型在不同文化语境下的道德决策能力。
abstract_cn: 语言模型正越来越多地被用于跨语言和文化背景的道德决策，然而现有研究在三个方面忽视了多语言性：1）多语言评估基准采用直接翻译，未能适配文化特定项目；2）道德推理的推理时方法依赖静态的、以英语为中心的支架，且缺乏道德理论基础；3）道德决策的训练方法通常需要来自更强模型或人工标注者的昂贵监督。我们通过三项贡献填补这些空白。首先，我们提出MCLASH，一个多语言道德决策基准，旨在捕捉跨语言的文化嵌入的道德直觉与社会规范。其次，我们提出MET（基于理论推理的多语言伦理学），一种两步提示方法，建立在由专家策划的、基于心理学与哲学的理论基础之上：模型首先选择情境与文化特定的基础，然后以用户的母语进行推理。第三，我们提出MET-D（MET蒸馏），通过一个无需外部监督的自蒸馏训练阶段来增强第二步。MET-D在三种不同规模与系列（Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B、Gemma3-4B）的模型上，相较于基础模型，在MCLASH上平均提升宏F1值3.71分，在MMoralExceptQA上提升4.23分，其中在Qwen3-8B上针对马来语的MCLASH增益最高达12.94分。我们进一步揭示，MET-D平均提升母语推理62.13分，且有益基础在不同文化中存在系统性差异。这些贡献共同为文化对齐、理论支撑的多语言道德推理开辟了道路。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：capture、language、user

title: STEP: Career-Path Recommendation via Temporal and Educational Trajectory Modeling
abstract: Career paths encode decades of skill acquisition, role transitions, and educational investment, and understanding them at scale underpins workforce planning, labor market policy, and job recommendation. Resumes are a rich source of information about career paths: they contain detailed descriptions of work experience, education, and skills. Yet their unstructured, heterogeneous, and multilingual nature has long prevented large-scale systematic analysis. With the advent of large language models (LLMs), it is now possible to source rich career trajectory data containing temporal and educational signals from unstructured resumes, enabling new opportunities for career-path recommendation. Exploiting this opportunity, we present STEP (Sequential Trajectory of Employment Prediction), a novel career-path recommendation system that leverages temporal and educational signals to predict the next job in a career trajectory. STEP integrates a time-decay Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) cell to model temporal dynamics, Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) conditioned on educational attainment, and attention-based sequence pooling to select relevant features for next job prediction. To improve internal occupation representation for STEP, we introduce ROUTE, a two-stage contrastive procedure that first adapts a multilingual encoder to the career domain via unsupervised denoising autoencoding, then performs supervised contrastive fine-tuning with guided negative selection. We evaluate STEP on four datasets of career trajectories, including an improved version of our publicly available JobHop dataset, and show that it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in next job prediction. The dataset and code are publicly released to support reproducible career-trajectory research.
tldr: 论文提出STEP系统，利用LLM从简历中提取时间序列和教育信号，通过时间衰减GRU和FiLM进行序列推荐，在下一职位预测任务上超越基线。
abstract_cn: 职业路径编码了数十年的技能习得、角色转换和教育投资，大规模理解这些路径是劳动力规划、劳动力市场政策和职位推荐的基础。简历是职业路径信息的丰富来源：它们包含工作经验、教育和技能的详细描述。然而，其非结构化、异质性和多语言的特点长期以来阻碍了大规模系统性分析。随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现，现在可以从非结构化简历中获取包含时间与教育信号的丰富职业轨迹数据，为职业路径推荐创造了新的机遇。利用这一机遇，我们提出了STEP（就业预测的序列轨迹），这是一种新颖的职业路径推荐系统，它利用时间与教育信号来预测职业轨迹中的下一个职位。STEP集成了时间衰减门控循环单元（GRU）以建模时间动态、基于教育程度的特征线性调制（FiLM），以及基于注意力的序列池化以选择用于下一职位预测的相关特征。为了改进STEP的内部职业表征，我们引入了ROUTE，这是一个两阶段对比流程：首先通过无监督去噪自编码将多语言编码器适配到职业领域，然后通过引导式负样本选择进行监督对比微调。我们在四个职业轨迹数据集上评估了STEP，包括我们公开可用的JobHop数据集的改进版本，并证明其在下一职位预测中优于最先进的基线模型。数据集和代码已公开发布，以支持可复现的职业轨迹研究。

analysis.chinese_title: STEP：通过时间和教育轨迹建模进行职业路径推荐
analysis.summary: 本文提出STEP（Sequential Trajectory of Employment Prediction），一种基于时间衰减GRU、特征线性调制（FiLM）和注意力池化的职业路径推荐系统，用于预测职业轨迹中的下一个职位。为提升职业嵌入质量，作者引入ROUTE，一种两阶段对比学习流程：先通过无监督去噪自编码进行领域适应，再通过引导负样本选择的监督对比微调。在四个数据集（包括改进的JobHop v2）上的实验表明，STEP在下一职位预测任务上优于现有基线。数据集和代码已公开。
innovations: 提出STEP模型，集成时间衰减GRU、FiLM教育程度调节和注意力池化，实现时间与教育信号的联合建模。
提出ROUTE两阶段对比学习流程，结合TSDAE无监督领域适应和GISTEmbedLoss引导负样本选择，提升职业嵌入质量。
发布JobHop v2数据集，相比原版具有更高质量提取、更丰富标注（五级教育程度）和零提取失败率。
在多个公开基准上取得最先进结果，并进行了详细的消融研究。
analysis.methodology: STEP使用ROUTE预训练的多语言编码器将职位文本映射为嵌入，然后通过时间衰减GRU处理序列，利用FiLM根据教育程度调节隐藏状态，最后通过注意力池化聚合序列并计算温度缩放余弦相似度进行下一职位预测。ROUTE第一阶段使用TSDAE对编码器进行领域适应，第二阶段使用GISTEmbedLoss进行监督对比微调。
analysis.key_results: STEP在Decorte、Karrierewege、JobHop和JobHop v2四个数据集上均优于现有基线。ROUTE在JobHop v2上Recall@10提升4.5个百分点。消融实验表明温度缩放对性能影响最大。
tech_stack: GISTEmbedLoss（Guided In-Sample Triplet Selection for Embedding Loss）
strengths: 创新性地结合时间衰减GRU和FiLM，有效利用时间间隔和教育程度信息。
ROUTE两阶段对比学习显著提升嵌入质量，且方法通用。
在多个公开数据集上取得最先进结果，实验全面。
公开数据集和代码，促进可重复研究。
limitations: 模型依赖ROUTE预训练嵌入，计算开销较大。
时间衰减GRU假设指数衰减，可能不适用于所有职业转换模式。
教育程度仅考虑最高学历，未纳入专业或学校信息。
数据集主要来自欧洲（荷兰、德国），可能不适用于其他劳动力市场。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 论文聚焦于序列推荐（职业路径预测），结合LLM进行信息提取和表示学习，涉及推荐系统与LLM结合、用户建模（职业轨迹）和工业落地（公开数据集）。与序列推荐、生成式推荐、LLM与推荐系统结合、用户建模等关键词高度相关。

title: JobHop v2: A Large-Scale Career Trajectory Dataset from Unstructured Resumes
abstract: Large-scale, richly annotated career trajectory data underpins workforce planning, job recommendation, and labour market analysis, yet publicly available datasets are either small, closed to independent use, or built from pre-standardized occupational codes with LLM-synthesized rather than authentic free text. We present JobHop~v2, an improved version of the publicly available JobHop dataset, constructed through end-to-end large language model (LLM) extraction from a corpus of ${\sim}440{,}000$ pseudonymized, multilingual resumes provided by VDAB, the Flemish Public Employment Service. The released dataset comprises $355{,}315$ career trajectories annotated with ESCO occupational codes, quarter-level temporal information, and normalized five-level education attainment, broadening both the coverage and the annotation richness of the original release. Relative to v1, JobHop~v2 introduces a redesigned extraction pipeline based on reasoning-controlled LLM inference with a retry mechanism (achieving a 100% JSON parse rate), a richer extraction schema, and a revised evaluation protocol scored against three complementary annotation baselines. Evaluated against these baselines, our best extractor comes closest to the inter-annotator agreement ceiling among all compared models, trailing it by only 1.1-2.7 percentage points. The dataset and code are publicly released to support reproducible career-trajectory research.
tldr: 论文通过LLM从非结构化简历中提取并构建了大规模职业轨迹数据集JobHop v2，用于支持工作推荐和劳动力市场分析。
abstract_cn: 大规模、丰富标注的职业轨迹数据集支撑着劳动力规划、职位推荐和劳动力市场分析，然而公开可用的数据集要么规模较小、无法独立使用，要么基于预先标准化的职业代码构建，且使用大语言模型合成而非真实的自由文本。我们提出JobHop~v2，这是公开可用的JobHop数据集的改进版本，通过端到端的大语言模型（LLM）从佛兰德斯公共就业服务机构VDAB提供的约44万份匿名化、多语言简历语料库中提取构建而成。发布的数据集包含355,315条职业轨迹，标注有ESCO职业代码、季度级时间信息以及标准化的五级教育程度，既扩展了原始数据集的覆盖范围，也丰富了其标注内容。相较于v1版本，JobHop~v2引入了基于推理控制的LLM推理与重试机制（实现了100%的JSON解析率）重新设计的提取流程、更丰富的提取模式，以及针对三个互补标注基线进行评估的修订版评估协议。基于这些基线的评估结果显示，在所有对比模型中，我们最优的提取器最接近标注者间一致性上限，仅落后1.1至2.7个百分点。该数据集和代码已公开发布，以支持可复现的职业轨迹研究。

analysis.chinese_title: JobHop v2：来自非结构化简历的大规模职业轨迹数据集
analysis.summary: 本文提出了JobHop v2，一个从约44万份假名化多语言简历中通过端到端大语言模型（LLM）提取构建的大规模职业轨迹数据集。数据集包含355,315条职业轨迹，标注有ESCO职业代码、季度级时间信息和五级教育程度。相比v1，v2引入了基于推理控制LLM推断的重试机制（实现100% JSON解析率）、更丰富的提取模式以及针对三个互补标注基线的修订评估协议。最佳提取器在三个基线上最接近标注者间一致性上限，差距仅为1.1–2.7个百分点。数据集和代码已公开，以支持可复现的职业轨迹研究。
innovations: 构建了JobHop v2数据集，包含355,315条职业轨迹，标注ESCO代码、季度时间信息和五级教育程度，覆盖更广、注释更丰富。
设计了基于推理控制LLM推断的提取流水线，包含多步重试机制，实现100% JSON解析率。
提出了修订的评估协议，包含渐进式部分评分和三个互补标注基线，区分真实提取错误与标注噪声。
采用两步ESCO职业代码分配策略（主分配+救援分配），平衡覆盖率和标签质量。
通过盲法成对比较验证v2优于v1，v2在68.3%的简历上被偏好。
analysis.methodology: 使用零样本、规则丰富的指令提示，结合严格的结构化JSON输出，基于openai/gpt-oss-120b模型（120B参数）在高推理努力下进行提取。提取后经过五阶段清洗流水线（解析伪影校正、无效范围校正、精确去重、质量过滤、连续工作合并）和归一化流水线（ESCO代码分配、时间归一化、教育水平归一化）。评估采用200份基准简历，使用修订的协议（字符串相似度、日期评分、字段重要性加权），对比三个标注基线（手工标注、编辑标签、智能体标签）。
key_results: 数据集包含355,315条独特简历、1,993,291条工作经历和923,981条教育经历。
ESCO分配中，93.0%通过主路径，0.1%通过救援机制，6.9%标记为未知。
GPT-OSS-120B（高推理）在三个基线上最接近标注者一致性上限，差距1.1–2.7个百分点。
盲法比较中，v2在68.3%的简历上被偏好（v1为29.9%），准确率得分8.60 vs 7.81，完整性得分8.24 vs 7.38。
重试机制恢复了约50,500份初始失败的简历，实现100% JSON解析率。
tech_stack: Kimi K2.6（用于盲法比较的评判模型）
Claude Sonnet（用于编辑标签和智能体标签）
匈牙利算法（匹配条目相似度计算）
strengths: 数据集规模大（35万+轨迹），来自真实非结构化简历，具有高生态效度。
提取流水线设计严谨，包含重试机制和清洗步骤，确保输出质量。
评估协议细致，使用三个标注基线和渐进式评分，减少标注噪声影响。
公开数据集和代码，促进可复现研究。
在多个基线上接近标注者一致性上限，表明提取质量高。
limitations: 6.9%的工作经历因保守的标签策略被标记为未知，覆盖不完全。
盲法比较仅使用单一评判模型，可能编码模型特定偏好。
评估局限于VDAB语料库及其三种语言，泛化性待验证。
盲法比较仅比较共享字段，未体现v2新增字段（技能、语言等）的价值。
参考评估仅使用200份简历，样本量有限。
relevance_to_keywords: LLM与推荐系统结合：论文核心是使用LLM从非结构化简历中提取结构化职业轨迹数据，直接相关。
序列推荐：职业轨迹本质上是序列数据，可用于序列推荐任务（如下一个职业预测）。
用户建模：数据集包含教育、工作经历等多维信息，支持用户建模。
工业落地：数据集来自真实就业服务机构，具有工业应用潜力。
因果性/公平性：论文提及公平性注意事项，但未深入分析。
